title: RevertData
description:
`revert` (a **forward** git-revert restoring older bytes as a new, higher-`seq` version — never a
pointer rollback, never a delete). `--to` names the GOOD version. **INFERRED.**

new_version_id.description: The new forward-revert commit that carries those bytes.

reverted_to.description: The good version named by `--to` (the bytes being restored).

Generation.description:
The internal anti-replay counter `(epoch, seq)`. NEVER rendered to a user; the
agent consumes `expected`/`current` on a CONFLICT.
